# capacity

**Instance Property**

The data capacity of the zone, in bytes.

## Declaration

```swift
var capacity: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

You specify the capacity of a zone when creating it with the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator/newZone(_:)] method of a concrete class implementing the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator] protocol.

## Inspecting a Zone

- **allocator**: The allocator object that created the zone.
